particulars.description: The freehold property known as land and buildings on the south east side of church street, theale (also known as horseman coaches, the green, RG7 5DR) registered under title number BK81963 the freehold property known as unit 4, 11/12, marcus close, tilehurst, reading, RG30 4EA registered under title number BK277189.

The freehold property known as 11-12 marcus close, reading, RG30 4EA as the same is registered at hm land registry with title no BK277189 and any part or parts of it and including all rights attached or appurtenant to it and all buildings fixtures fittings plant and machinery from time to time situated on it.

The freehold property known as land and buildings on the south east side of church street, theale (also known as horseman coaches, the green, RG7 5DR) as the same is registered at hm land registry with title no BK81963 and any part or parts of it and including all rights attached or appurtenant to it and all buildings fixtures fittings plant and machinery from time to time situated on it.
